name: Special Benefits for SoneFi / XY Finance / CometBridge / RetroBridge users
description:
Welcome to your new home, users from SoneFi, XY Finance, CometBridge, and RetroBridge.

Over the past two years, SoneFi, XY Finance, CometBridge, and RetroBridge have gradually shut down. You may have left important footprints there—but it might be time to move to a new home: WheelX.

WheelX supports both bridging and swapping, and offers a faster, cheaper, and more secure experience.

We’re also offering $1 newcomer Bonus and 20%–40% fee discounts for users from these platforms.

Give it a try and verify your benefits here: https://wheelx.fi/move

name: Join the Olympex Partners Program and Earn Additional Income 🚀
description:
Getting started is simple:
• Go to our website
• Fill out the application form
• Get approved and start sharing Olympex

But this goes beyond a typical partner program.

At Olympex, we reward participation across the entire ecosystem:
• Earn performance-based revenue as a partner
• Get rewarded for your on-chain activity inside the platform
• Increase your benefits through the Olympex Pass NFT, which tracks your volume and referrals
• Unlock fee discounts and future rewards as your Pass evolves
• Participate in community activities and engagement campaigns

The more you use Olympex, the more you contribute, and the more you grow with the ecosystem.

There isn’t just one way to win here. There are many.

It all depends on how far you want to take it.

name: UPROCK.AI  Early Access
description:
UpRock is the first mobile-first Decentralized Physical Infrastructure Network (DePIN) that allows users to earn passive rewards by sharing their idle internet bandwidth. With over 2.6 million users, UpRock powers a global data layer that fuels AI innovation and provides uncensored access to real-time information.

name: Generate Extra Income with the Partners Program
description:
Mint your Olympex Pass and start accumulating points with every action on the platform. Your activity only counts if you hold the Pass, this is your gateway to future rewards, benefits, and progression.

Early users are the ones who get positioned first.

Want to go further? You can also apply to the Olympex Partners Program and start generating additional income by bringing new users into the ecosystem.

Don’t wait. Start early.

name: ENTROPY Partner Spotlight
description:
Just Entropy is a unique "Pure DePIN" and mineable memecoin project on Solana that turns the concept of "mining nothing" into a global network. Built with a "miners eat first" philosophy, it rewards participants for generating entropy (randomness) using specialized hardware, creating a decentralized infrastructure with zero VC funding or founder allocations.

name: Hack the Mint: Unlock Your Olympex Pass the Smart Way
description:
The Olympex Pass mint is now live.

Those who complete these social tasks and win may be eligible to receive it completely free as one of the two rewards.

Now here’s the smart trick.

You might see the $250 requirement and think you need $250 in capital.

You don’t.

You only need $250 in swap volume.

With as little as $10, you can swap between stablecoins like USDC and USDT multiple times until you reach the required volume.

No speculative tokens.
No risky exposure.
Just simple stablecoin swaps.

Sometimes it’s not about having more money.
It’s about knowing how to play smart.

Unlock your Pass, start building your position inside the ecosystem, and let your activity compound over time.

name: Stable × Frax × IQ Community Partnership
description:
Frax, IQ, and StableChain are joining forces for a community partnership campaign on Galxe.

This collaboration brings together leading builders across stablecoins, AI, and payment infrastructure to drive ecosystem growth and user adoption.

Participants will have the opportunity to engage with all three communities, complete tasks, and earn rewards across the ecosystem.

Stable is a USD₮-native Layer 1 powering StableChain, designed for agentic payments with fast settlement, low fees, and predictable costs. Supported by Bitfinex, PayPal Ventures, and the USDT0.

Frax is building the most scalable stablecoin infrastructure for the next generation of finance.
IQ powers onchain AI agents with the IQ token and launched KRWQ, the first Korean won stablecoin.
